response:
── 💡  Jarvis Tips ─────────────────────────────────────
  [1]  💡 Type 'morning summary' first thing to see your todos & reminders for the day.
  [2]  💡 Use 'open google <query>' or 'open youtube <query>' for quick browser searches.
  [3]  💡 'show history' lets you review your last 15 conversations with Jarvis.
  [4]  💡 Try 'ask <anything>' — Jarvis can answer questions using AI.
  [5]  💡 Set your name with 'set name <name>' so Jarvis can greet you personally.
  [6]  💡 'remind me in 30 minutes <task>' sets a quick countdown reminder.
  [7]  💡 Use 'chat' to enter full AI conversation mode without typing 'ask' each time.
  [8]  💡 'sysinfo' shows real-time CPU, RAM and disk usage.
  [9]  💡 Run any safe shell command with 'run <command>' (e.g. run echo hello).
  [10]  💡 Open 'gui.py' directly to launch Jarvis in the desktop GUI window.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  More commands: type 'help' for the full list.
